title: Misatos Car
wikitext:
[]: Misato's Car [spoilers]             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jul 16, 2009 5:47 pm Random: I added the changes to the wiki page for her car: http://wiki.evageeks.org/Misato%27s_Car Edit: realized I put this in the wrong thread, so it's split. The interesting thing here is that the Mazda Cosmo 110S is used a lot in "Return of Ultraman", and we all know how much Anno liked Ultraman.
